dict.string: Reflect uses the microphone to record audio memos that are transcribed into your daily note.
Reflect reads your calendar to show the day's meetings beside your daily note. Access is read-only and stays on this device.
Reflect reads your calendar to show the day's meetings beside your daily note. Access is read-only and stays on this device.
Reflect reads your contacts to suggest details for person notes. Nothing is stored or sent anywhere.
